messages.content: \textbf{Training-based reward models} leverage supervised fine-tuning or reinforcement learning to learn reward functions from human annotations 这个human annotations能不能改一改，因为也有用模型标注的情况

当然可以改。以下是几种改写建议：

## 选项1：更通用的表述
**Training-based reward models** leverage supervised fine-tuning or reinforcement learning to learn reward functions from **human feedback or annotations**

## 选项2：包含模型标注
**Training-based reward models** leverage supervised fine-tuning or reinforcement learning to learn reward functions from **preference labels** (e.g., human annotations or model-generated feedback)

## 选项3：更学术化的表述
**Training-based reward models** leverage supervised fine-tuning or reinforcement learning to learn reward functions from **annotated preferences**

## 选项4：明确两种来源
**Training-based reward models** leverage supervised fine-tuning or reinforcement learning to learn reward functions from **human or AI-generated annotations**

## 选项5：最简洁
**Training-based reward models** leverage supervised fine-tuning or reinforcement learning to learn reward functions from **preference data**

---

我个人推荐 **选项3（annotated preferences）** 或 **选项5（preference data）**，因为它们：
- 足够通用，涵盖各种标注来源
- 简洁，不会让句子过于冗长
- 符合学术写作习惯

您觉得哪种更适合您的上下文呢？
